payload.title: Model columns as workspace data + new event kind
payload.description: Define a per-workspace column config: array of {id, label, color, kind: open|done|cancelled, order}. Add a workspace.columns_set (or per-column) event kind (src/event-schema.js EVENT_KINDS) and persist/replay it onto the workspace (SQLite + src/pg). Seed defaults from the current six statuses (backlog/todo/in_progress/in_review/done/cancelled) for existing workspaces via migration.
